params.body:
Dear Alice,

Your follow-up appointment regarding plant care and progress after session 1 has been scheduled for June 10, 2024, from 10:00 AM to 10:30 AM.

If you have any questions or need to reschedule, please let us know.

Best regards,
Dr. Doctor
params.subject: Plant Follow-up Appointment Scheduled

params.body:
Dear Alice,

This is a follow-up after your recent visit. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reply to this message or schedule another appointment.

Best regards,
Dr. [Your Name]
params.subject: Follow-up After Your Recent Visit
